'''鈭歱-b-t''' ('''kapabat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knell|knell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knell|knell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-b-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapabat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabat|thipabat]] || [[word:jipabat|jipabat]] || [[word:shipabat|shipabat]] || [[word:kipabat|kipabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabat|thuthupabat]] || [[word:jujupabat|jujupabat]] || [[word:shushupabat|shushupabat]] || [[word:kukupabat|kukupabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabat|thupabat]] || [[word:jupabat|jupabat]] || [[word:shupabat|shupabat]] || [[word:kupabat|kupabat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabat|thupabat]] || [[word:jupabat|jupabat]] || [[word:shupabat|shupabat]] || [[word:kupabat|kupabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabat|thepabat]] || [[word:jepabat|jepabat]] || [[word:shepabat|shepabat]] || [[word:kepabat|kepabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabat|thothopabat]] || [[word:jojopabat|jojopabat]] || [[word:shoshopabat|shoshopabat]] || [[word:kokopabat|kokopabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabat|thopabat]] || [[word:jopabat|jopabat]] || [[word:shopabat|shopabat]] || [[word:kopabat|kopabat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabat|thopabat]] || [[word:jopabat|jopabat]] || [[word:shopabat|shopabat]] || [[word:kopabat|kopabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pabat|th忙pabat]] || [[word:j忙pabat|j忙pabat]] || [[word:sh忙pabat|sh忙pabat]] || [[word:k忙pabat|k忙pabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabat|thathapabat]] || [[word:jajapabat|jajapabat]] || [[word:shashapabat|shashapabat]] || [[word:kakapabat|kakapabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabat|thapabat]] || [[word:japabat|japabat]] || [[word:shapabat|shapabat]] || [[word:kapabat|kapabat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabat|thapabat]] || [[word:japabat|japabat]] || [[word:shapabat|shapabat]] || [[word:kapabat|kapabat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapabat|shapabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapabat|goshapabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapabat|gokishapabat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapabatn眉|shapabatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapabatnkn眉|goshapabatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabatn眉|gokishapabatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapabatsh毛|shapabatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapabatnksh毛|goshapabatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapabatsh毛|gokishapabatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabatro|shapabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabatnkro|goshapabatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabatro|gokishapabatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabatmu|shapabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabatnkmu|goshapabatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabatmu|gokishapabatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapabatsher|shapabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapabatnksher|goshapabatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapabatsher|gokishapabatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapabatng|shapabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapabatnkng|goshapabatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapabatng|gokishapabatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapabatya|shapabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapabatnkya|goshapabatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapabatya|gokishapabatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapabatyam|shapabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapabatnkyam|goshapabatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapabatyam|gokishapabatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabatn眉sh毛|shapabatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabatnkn眉sh毛|goshapabatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabatn眉sh毛|gokishapabatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabatn眉ro|shapabatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabatnkn眉ro|goshapabatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabatn眉ro|gokishapabatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabatn眉mu|shapabatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabatnkn眉mu|goshapabatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabatn眉mu|gokishapabatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabatsh毛n眉|shapabatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabatnksh毛n眉|goshapabatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabatsh毛n眉|gokishapabatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabatsh毛ro|shapabatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabatnksh毛ro|goshapabatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabatsh毛ro|gokishapabatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabatsh毛mu|shapabatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabatnksh毛mu|goshapabatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabatsh毛mu|gokishapabatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabatron眉|shapabatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabatnkron眉|goshapabatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabatron眉|gokishapabatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabatrosh毛|shapabatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabatnkrosh毛|goshapabatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabatrosh毛|gokishapabatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapabatromu|shapabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapabatnkromu|goshapabatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapabatromu|gokishapabatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapabatmun眉|shapabatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapabatnkmun眉|goshapabatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapabatmun眉|gokishapabatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapabatmush毛|shapabatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapabatnkmush毛|goshapabatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapabatmush毛|gokishapabatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapabatmuro|shapabatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapabatnkmuro|goshapabatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapabatmuro|gokishapabatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
